title: cirsium × subalpinum
intro: Cirsium × subalpinum, also known as the hybrid thistle, is a rare and hybrid species of thistle that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cirsium × subalpinum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting the immune system. Cirsium × subalpinum can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
